title: Tax' Creepy Speaker
description: Creepy Speaker is a Minecraft resource pack that replaces the villager speech sounds with creepy voice effects.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ba03f5bb9d9a45b818345df20b01b30b7cd85d.png)

Overview:
Creepy Speaker is a Minecraft resource pack that replaces the villager speech sounds with creepy voice effects.
![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2c09de5f1f23c3ae9584cc91c403fe7c316143f_0.webp)

Cooperation:
This pack is aspecially written for the Cave Horror Project modpack. Try out this amazing pack.

Installation:
Just drag and drop the .zip file in the folder located at .mineraft/resourcepacks, or just simply use the Curseforge client.

Permission:
You are allowed and welcome to use this modification in your modpack. 

Credit:
Written by Taknax
